---
name: Feature request
about: Propose a focused MediaShell improvement
title: "[Feature]: "
labels: enhancement
assignees: ""
---

## Proposal

Describe the requested behavior using the canonical MediaShell terms when applicable: App selector, Track Information, Playback Controls, Playback Progress, Album Art, Visualizer, Mouse Actions, Keyboard Shortcuts, Blocked Apps, or System media controls.

## Motivation

Explain the user workflow or limitation this would address.

## Expected behavior

Describe how the feature should behave, including defaults, settings, and interaction with existing components.

## Compatibility and lifecycle

Note any expected MPRIS, D-Bus, GNOME Shell, performance, accessibility, or migration implications.

## Alternatives

Describe existing workarounds or simpler approaches you considered.
